zh.lifeSummary: 當Engelbert IV d'Enghien,於1178年8月8日出生時，他的父親Engelbert III d'Enghien38歲，母親Isabeau de Trazegnies8歲。他與Adelaïde d'Avesnes在法國諾爾德艾維斯-素-爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1246年2月22日享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Engelbert IV d'Enghien,于1178年8月8日出生时，他的父亲Engelbert III d'Enghien38岁，母亲Isabeau de Trazegnies8岁。他与Adelaïde d'Avesnes在法国諾爾德艾維斯-素-爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1246年2月22日享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Engelbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from engel (representing Ingal, from Ing, the name of a Germanic god), Angel ‘Angle’, or engel ‘angel’ + berht ‘bright’.

variants.name: Engelbrecht
meanings: from engel (representing Ingal, from Ing, the name of a Germanic god), Angel ‘Angle’, or engel ‘angel’ + berht ‘bright’.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Engelbert IV d'Enghien, was born on 8 August 1178, his father, Engelbert III d'Enghien, was 38 and his mother, Isabeau de Trazegnies, was 8. He married Adelaïde d'Avesnes in Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 February 1246, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Engelbert IV d'Enghien, est né le 8 août 1178, son père, Engelbert III d'Enghien, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Isabeau de Trazegnies, avait 8 ans. Il a épousé Adelaïde d'Avesnes à Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 février 1246, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Engelbert IV d'Enghien, am 8. August 1178 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Engelbert III d'Enghien 38 und seine Mutter Isabeau de Trazegnies 8. Er hat in Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Frankreich Adelaïde d'Avesnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Februar 1246 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Engelbert IV d'Enghien, è nato il il 8 agosto 1178, il suo padre, Engelbert III d'Enghien, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Isabeau de Trazegnies, aveva 8 anni. Lui sposato Adelaïde d'Avesnes nel Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 febbraio 1246, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Engelbert IV d'Enghien,が1178年8月8日に生まれた時，父Engelbert III d'Enghienは38歳，母Isabeau de Trazegniesは8歳であった。フランスノードエイベスネス-スル-ヘルペでAdelaïde d'Avesnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1246年2月22日に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Engelbert IV d'Enghien,(이)가 1178년 8월 8일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Engelbert III d'Enghien(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabeau de Trazegnies(은)는 8세였다. 그는 프랑스 노르드 에베스네스-수-헬프에서 Adelaïde d'Avesnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1246년 2월 22일 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.8 août 1178–22 February 1246: 1178 оны Наймдугаар сарын 8–1246 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 22

pt.8 août 1178–22 February 1246: 8 de agosto de 1178–22 de fevereiro de 1246
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Engelbert IV d'Enghien, nasceu em 8 de agosto de 1178, seu pai, Engelbert III d'Enghien, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Isabeau de Trazegnies, tinha 8 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelaïde d'Avesnes em Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1246, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Engelbert IV d'Enghien, родился 8 августа 1178 г., его отцу по имени Engelbert III d'Enghien было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabeau de Trazegnies, 8. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelaïde d'Avesnes в местности авеснес-сур-хелп, норд, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 февраля 1246 г. в возрасте 67 лет.

es.8 août 1178–22 February 1246: 8 de agosto de 1178–22 de febrero de 1246
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Engelbert IV d'Enghien, nació el 8 de agosto de 1178, su papá, Engelbert III d'Enghien, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Isabeau de Trazegnies, tenía 8 años. Se casó con Adelaïde d'Avesnes en Avesnes-sur-Helpe, Nord, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de febrero de 1246, a la edad de 67 años.
